body_excerpt: The conversation details an out-of-bounds (OOB) write vulnerability in the Broadcom (BCM) WiFi driver. Specifically, the wl_cfg80211_wbtext_table_config function is vulnerable. The vulnerability arises from a heap buffer overflow due to the btcfg->count variable being controlled by firmware, leading to an uncontrolled memcpy.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
